summary: Audio briefing playback hangs indefinitely on iOS 17.4+
description:
On iPhones running iOS 17.4 or 17.4.1, tapping play on an audio briefing shows the loading spinner indefinitely without audio starting. AVAudioSession activation race surfaces under iOS 17.4's stricter background-audio policy.

Fix: explicit AVAudioSession.setCategory + setActive sequence before AVPlayer rate change. Merged into v8.4 branch.
